changes.title: Regiments of Renown have arrived!
description: *The Pirazzo’s Lost Legion steps forth into the jungles of Lustria. From a canopy above, the Tichi Huichi Raiders watch, silent and deadly, waiting for the moment to strike...*
You can now try out TWO new Regiments of Renown in your lists.

changes.title: Army lists updated for version 2.26!
description: This includes many stat and points changes. it is HIGHLY recommended that you create new lists instead of updating existing lists.

changes.title: UI/UX Improvements
description: Create Army UI has changed to make army creation more intuitive
Unit Card/magic item details have been given a facelift to give them a more intuitive UI.

changes.title: Set Points Limit
description: When creating your army, you can now (optionally!) set a max points limit so you can clearly see the unit restrictions right from the beginning. Users must take caution with this option since armies that are below this limit will be considered legal.

changes.title: Swapping Units
description: When creating your army, you can now (optionally!) set a max points limit so you can clearly see the unit restrictions right from the beginning. Users must take caution with this option since armies that are below this limit will be considered legal.

changes.title: Army Builder changes
description: You can now both add and remove units from the Add Unit
